name: Leh Palace
description: A massive, nine-story dun-colored royal palace built into the side of a mountain, dominating the Leh cityscape and offering panoramic views.
history: Built by King Sengge Namgyal in the 17th century. Modeled after the Potala Palace in Lhasa, Tibet.
famousFor: Tibetan architecture, panoramic views of Leh, historical artifacts.
